name: netlify-agent-executor
description: Netlify Agent eXecutor: create agent workflow issues from reusable prompt templates.

scripts.check: node --check bin/nax.js && node --check lib/prompts.js && node --check lib/multiline.js && node --check lib/review-context.js && node --check lib/round-results.js && node --check lib/issue-groups.js && node --check lib/comment-markers.js
